theme_notes: Touchstones: 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage (Ecuador 2-1 Germany; Turkey vs USA tonight; 48-team first ever); Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire via SpaceX Nasdaq IPO ($75B raised, ticker SPCX); Venezuela declares state of emergency after back-to-back 7.2 and 7.5 earthquakes near Caracas (164 dead); US requests $88B for Iran war as Switzerland talks yield 60-day peace roadmap; NY Knicks NBA champions (Jalen Brunson Finals MVP).
settled: Cleaner than the US-Iran ceasefire. Probably lasts longer too.
All square. Like a World Cup group stage everyone wants to forget.
Settled up. Like the Switzerland talks — but with actual consequences if it breaks.
youOwe: You owe less than Musk earns in the time it took to load this page.
Under fifty bucks. Even Ecuador can beat Germany, yet here you sit.
That's nothing. Pay it. Don't be the Venezuela of this friendship.
That's about one SpaceX share at IPO price. Coincidence? Probably.
Jalen Brunson scored more than this per quarter. At least he showed up.
Enough for a World Cup nosebleed seat. Or you could just pay your debts.
Germany just got knocked out by Ecuador. Your debt is the bigger upset.
Musk earns this in the time it takes him to sneeze. That's your context.
The US is spending $88 billion on Iran. You're sweating about $400.
Musk is a trillionaire. You are $700 into someone else's goodwill.
The Knicks rebuilt for a decade before they won. You've owed longer.
Switzerland brokered an Iran deal in a weekend. Still waiting on you.
SpaceX went public and made history. You are making someone miserable.
Jalen Brunson carried the Knicks to a championship. Who's carrying this?
Turkey faces the US at the World Cup tonight. You face a worse matchup.
Venezuela had two quakes in 60 seconds and declared emergency faster than you'll pay this.
Musk became the world's first trillionaire. You became his financial opposite.
The US is funding the Iran war for $88 billion. They're funding your lifestyle for five grand.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a beer at a World Cup stadium. Still counts.
Not enough to buy a single SpaceX share. But it's the principle.
The World Cup hasn't hit knockouts yet. Start collecting early.
About what the Iran talks cost per second in wasted diplomacy. Chase it.
The Knicks won the chip. You deserve a victory lap too. Ask for it.
Switzerland drafted a nuclear roadmap in a day. You need a payment plan.
Ecuador beat Germany 2-1. You're winning in the ledger too.
Not Musk money. But real money. Collect with confidence.
The Obama Center finally opened. Time to open a collections conversation.
Venezuela declared a state of emergency over less. Consider your options.
The US wrote an $88 billion check with less drama than this debt.
Jalen Brunson didn't win MVP by carrying deadweight. Think on that.
SpaceX raised $75 billion in a day. They can't scrape four figures for you?
The World Cup now has 48 teams. Still easier to track than their excuses.
Switzerland negotiated a nuclear deal faster than this debt has moved.
At this point you're not owed money. You're owed a seat at the peace talks.
Musk crossed a trillion. Your partner crossed a line. Seek damages.
The Ebola outbreak has better containment protocols than this balance.
